title: Ziyarat Aal e Yasin - Imam Mahdi (atfs)

relatedLinks.text: PDF - Commentary of Ziyarat Aal e Yasin

duas.title: Ziyarat Aal e Yaseen - Imam Mahdi (atfs)
duas.description:
Ziarah Aal-e-Yaseen is an important Ziarah of Imam-e-Zaman (peace be upon him). It is actually a Hadith Qudsi (direct saying of Allah(swt)) as reported in Mafatih-al-Jinnan. According to the traditions, "Aal-e-Yaseen" is equivalent to "Aal-e-Muhammad(peace be upon them)" and is the correct pronunciation (Qira'at) of verse 37:130 of the Holy Quran. Beside its superb beauty, one of the interesting points about this Duaa is that, in it, we confess all the central beliefs one by one. It is also recommended to be recited to obtain relief from oppression.
Mafatih al-Jinan: Ziyarat Aal-i Yasin The honorable Shaykh Ahmad ibn Abi Talib Tabrisi in his valuable work (called) al-Ihtijaj has related that in his letter to Muhammad Himyari, answering the questions raised by him, Imam Mahdi (`a) wrote, "In the Name of God, the Compassionate, the Merciful. Neither you understand His affair, nor do you accept from His friends, Mature wisdom; - but (the preaching of) Warners profits them not, (from those who have not faith), peace be upon us and all righteous servants of Allah.
Whenever you want to pay attention to God through us and also to us, recite the following as God has said:" (Allahumma inna hadhihi buq`atun tahhartahaأAnother entrance leave: Allamah Majlisi has cited an entrance leave from an old manuscript that begins with "O Allah! Verily this is the mausoleum You purified and is the locality You dignified *
It is a Hadith Qudsi (direct saying of Allah(swt)) in Mafatih-al-Jinnan. is reported from Shaykh Ahmad ibn Abi-Talib al-Tabrisi in his book of al-Ihtijaj:
The chain of narrators is: Al-Tabarsi narrates that Mohammad son of Abdullah al-Hemyari received this Ziyarah in a written letter from Imam Mahdi (a) during the minor occultation. Ref.:Al-Ehtejaaj by Shaykh al-Tabarsi.

segments.translation: Peace be upon the Household of Yasin.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا دَاعِيَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَبَّانِيَّ آيَاتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya da`iya allahi wa rabbaniyya ayatihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O caller to Allah and interpreter of His Verses.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ ٱللَّهِ وَدَيَّانَ دِينِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baba allahi wa dayyana dinihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O door to Allah and applier of His religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَلِيفَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَنَاصِرَ حَقِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khalifata allahi wa nasira haqqihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O viceroy of Allah and backer of His right.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَدَلِيلَ إِرَادَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya hujjata allahi wa dalila iradatihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Argument of Allah and sign of His volition.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا تَالِيَ كِتَابِ ٱللَّهِ وَتَرْجُمَانَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya taliya kitabi allahi wa tarjumanihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O reciter of the Book of Allah and its interpreter.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ فِي آنَاءِ لَيْلِكَ وَأَطْرَافِ نَهَارِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka fi ana'i laylika wa atrafi naharika
segments.translation: Peace be upon you at the hours of Your night and the two ends of Your day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَقِيَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya baqiyyata allahi fi ardihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O herald of Allah on His lands.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مِيثَاقَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَخَذَهُ وَوَكَّدَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mithaqa allahi alladhi akhadhahu wa wakkadahu
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O covenant of Allah that He has made and confirmed.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي ضَمِنَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya wa`da allahi alladhi daminahu
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Promise of Allah that He has assured.
Peace be upon you, O appointed pennon,
poured knowledge,
aid, and expansive mercy.
This is verily a promise that shall never be belied.
Peace be upon you whenever you rise (to undertake the mission).
Peace be upon you whenever you sit.
Peace be upon you whenever you recite and elucidate.
Peace be upon you whenever you offer prayer and supplicate.
Peace be upon you whenever you genuflect and prostrate (yourself for Allah).
Peace be upon you whenever you profess Allah’s Godhead and profess His All-greatness.
Peace be upon you whenever you praise Allah and implore for His forgiveness.
Peace be upon you whenever you begin and end your day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you in the night when it draws a veil
and the day when it shines in brightness.
Peace be upon you, O entrusted leader.
Peace be upon you, O favored and expected.
Peace be upon you to the ultimate meaning of peace.
I solicit you, O my master,

segments.arabic: أَنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: anni ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu
segments.translation: to testify to me that I bear witness that there is no god but Allah;
One and Only Lord and having no associate,
and that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.

segments.transliteration: la habiba illa huwa wa ahluhu
segments.translation: There is no one more beloved by Allah than him and his household.
And I solicit you, O my master, to testify to me that I bear witness
that `Ali the Commander of the Faithful is His argument,
al-Hasan is His argument,
al-Husayn is His argument,
`Ali the son of al-Husayn is His argument,
Muhammad the son of `Ali is His argument,
Ja`far the son of Muhammad is His argument,
Musa the son of Ja`far is His argument,
`Ali the son of Musa is His argument,
Muhammad the son of `Ali is His argument,
`Ali the son of Muhammad is His argument,
and al-Hasan the son of `Ali is His argument.
I also bear witness that you are verily the argument of Allah.
You all are the first and the last.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ رَجْعَتَكُمْ حَقٌّ لاَ رَيْبَ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa anna raj`atakum haqqun la rayba fiha
segments.translation: And (I bear witness) that your (promised) Return is undoubtedly true
“On the day when its belief avails not a soul
which theretofore believed not,
nor in its belief earned good by works,”
death is true,

segments.transliteration: wa anna nakiran wa nakiran haqqun
segments.translation: and Nakir and Nakir are true.
And I bear witness that the Raising for death is true,
the Resurrection is true,
the Discriminating Bridge is true,
the Watchtower is true,
the Balance (of deeds) is true,
the Gathering is true,
the Reckoning is true,
Paradise and Hell are true,
and the promise of Paradise and the threat with Hell are true.
O My master! Certainly wretched is he who opposes you
and certainly happy is he who obeys you.
So, testify to me all that which I have besought you to testify.
I am verily an ally of you
and denouncing your enemy.
The truth is only that which you accept,
the wrong is only that which you disallow,
the good is only that which you enjoin,
and the evil is only that which you forbid.
My soul is thus believing in Allah;
One and Only Lord and having no associate,
and also in His Messenger, in the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.transliteration: wa bikum ya mawlaya awwalikum wa akhirikum
segments.translation: and in you all, O my master, from the beginning to the end.
I have prepared myself to back you
and my love is sincerely dedicated to you.
Respond! Respond!
